feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Compensation story report average
entry.content:
To replace dashboards that will be deprecated I'm just trying to do an average in a story report of Compa-ratio by Job Grade. 

The average doesn't calculate the same way as the average in a Tile I used before in my dashboard. The tile is correct and the story report shows the wrong average. There are no null or 0 values in my data.

See screenshot of attached configuration 

I'm using a Dimension to Measure Calculation for my Measure in this graph and the dimension is Current job grade.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Analytics Average Calculation
entry.content: I am using SAP cloud analytics to find the average profit by region using a calculated measure. However it does not show the average but only the sum.  I chose Average for operation and Aggregation Dimension as Region. See screenshot. The chart for Aggregation shows sum instead of average. Please advise. Thanks

entry.title: Date prefilled as Yesterday in Calender
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking out for a calender to be appearing on the top of the SAC story with yesterday's date selected and if today is Monday then it should have selected last friday. Is there any way we can acheieve it in story filter.

Regards,

Singh

entry.title: How to DISABLE the Presentation Mode in SAC?
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone know how to DISABLE the new functionality - presentation mode in SAP SAC? It happens to be confusing for our users and the comments don't get saved when they enter in that mode. So we want to disable it. It's useless for us.

SAP Analytics Cloud, hybrid analytics

entry.title: Value Driver Tree drill down - SAC design
entry.content:
Hello, 

I've created a simple VDT in an optimized story.

 

Drill down to customers/sku works well.

 

However, every attempt to drill up or collapse fails, and I lose the first aggregated design - I'm always getting back to the customers I've selected.

example no1 - collapse from the revenue will just hide/reveal the customers I've selected

example no2: trying to collapse the European customers - it collapses only the European rebates

 

 

 

 

 

 

When is this bug expected to be corrected?

Deb

entry.title: S4HC Public -> SAC - Delta / Incremental Transactional Data Loads
entry.content:
Hello,

we would like to implement the Delta / Incremental Transactional Data Loads functionality in SAC based on ACDOCA table in S4HC Public, but even after reading what we could find on the internet, we are not able to make it work. Our settings:

SAC Model: Planning - New Model Type

S4HC Public Architecture: 2 Layer - QAS and PROD

Connection: SAP S/4HANA Acquire Connection

From these two articles (attached below) I have come to a conclussion, that we have to create an OData service from the ACDOCA table and create a OData connection to it in SAC and then it should work. Problem is, that in our 2 layer S4HC Public architecture, there is no DEV layer and therefore it is not possible to develop these kinds of things. In would only work in the 3 layer S4HC Public architecture.

Is my understanding correct or is there some other way that I have not found?

Thank you very much for any help!
Merry Christmas,

Adam

A Simple Guide to Exposing an oData Service from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to the SAP Business Technology Platform Using Developer Extensibility

Solved: Expose CDS View as OData Service/API in S/4HANA Pu... - SAP Community

entry.title: About connection settings between SAC and S/4HANA Cloud(1YB)
entry.content:
So far, I have been working on importing and connecting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Analytics Cloud.

I proceeded with the following steps
Setting Up Import Connection Setup with SAP Analytics Cloud (1YB)
https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/1YB_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

I created a Communication System and Communication Arrangement on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud side, but I was unable to create a Connection on the SAC side.

If you know of anything to be careful of or a better procedure, please let me know.
Thank you for your comment.

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud | Passing story filters to SAC excel add - in.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I'm currently facing a situation where I need to pass story filters to an Excel add-in for SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using a URL.

Here's the scenario:

I have created a story in SAC, and the user wants to navigate from this story to an Excel add-in file for SAC. Additionally, the user wants the story's filters to be applied to the data in the Excel add-in during this navigation.

Could you please help me find a solution for this?

entry.title: SAC - Cell reference usage over several tables
entry.content:
Hello all,

I've worked a long time using BO - Web Intelligence.

Here I was able to define references for any cell in a table. This references were then available globally. This meant that a row could be created in another table in which the referenced cell from the first table was available for calculations.

Now I have similar requirements that I need to implement in SAC. Unfortunately, this functionality doesn't seem to exist here. I miss the flexibility that I know from various BO tools. Does anyone has an idea how this could be implemented? Is there perhaps a reference method that I haven't discovered yet?

Thanx!

entry.title: Filtering on Last Posting Date
entry.content:
Hi

I have requirement where for a table displaying all Doc type other that one (lets call it A) I only show Posting Dates that are after the Last Posting Date for Posting Date for Doc Type A.

So if for a particular Order No (the story is restricted to a given Order) Doc Type A has 2 Posting Dates. I want to take the Last Posting Date and filter a table to everything greater than that Posting Date.

Hope that makes sense.

Thanks

entry.title: How can I pass a value from an input field to a model variable in an SAC story?
entry.content: I created an input field where the user can manually enter a number. I want that number to be passed to a model variable. Is there a way to do this? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAC Planning Data
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

Could you please guide me to the planning data that is present in the 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PCqCXCsDiOg&list=PLs5htBIwERYXDsieiwDtgVgveDHW541oG&index=2

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Activate a data action on OnInitialization - SAC
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a data action in my optimized story that I want to be activated on page initialization.

I expect to see the data action pop-up for parameter entry without clicking on it (it will be hidden) when I enter the page.

what is the code I need?

Thanks

entry.title: how to create a Custom Widget Sankey Chart in SAC?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to develop a Custom Widget for a Sankey Chart for SAP Analytics Cloud.
I am using reference from this blog but the preexisting on from there does suffice my needs.
I need to modify or develop a new script to render a Node Aligned Sankey .

But with all my own developments or modifications to SAP scripts I am always getting the error : Something went wrong. The system couldn't load the custom widget 'com.sap.sac.sample.echarts.sankeyyg_1.x' (kind: 'main') for this reason: The system took too long to define the custom widget. Please contact your system administrator or the owner of the custom widget. 
and then
Failed to retrieve constructor for custom widget 'com.sap.sac.sample.echarts.sankeyyg_1.x' (kind: main)

can you please help/advice me on how to either resolve these errors or develop the charts?

entry.title: DataAction copy step
entry.content:
I’m working on a story that includes a table with a forecast for the first six months of 2024, followed by predictions for the remaining months of the year. I need to copy the data for the first six months into a table with the version "Planning." Additionally, I want to copy the forecast data for the remaining months into the same "Planning" table. If i could do that using only 1 Data Action, it would be perfect.

How can I achieve this?

entry.title: Combining 2 Dropdowns in an optimized story - SAC
entry.content:
Hey 

I have to dropdowns, one for sales org and the second for customer

in my OnInitialization the two should be filled with the members
I've tried this code:

 

var OrgVAR = Table_Demand_QTY.getDataSource().getMembers("IL_D_MNF_ORG");
for(var i=0; i<OrgVAR.length;i++){
	Dropdown_Sales_Org.addItem(OrgVAR[i].id,OrgVAR[i].description);
}
var CustomerVAR = Table_Demand_QTY.getDataSource().getMembers("IL_D_MNF_CUST");
for(var i=0; n<CustomerVAR.length;i++){
	Dropdown_Customer.addItem(CustomerVAR[i].id,CustomerVAR[i].description;
}

 

The two parts of the code work well apart.
Unfortunately, the full code gives the error "you can't use double declarations" on the second i=0 

what do I miss?

thank you

entry.title: Predicting Fixed Costs
entry.content: I’m working on a prediction table where some values are random across the months, while others are fixed. However, when I run the prediction, the fixed values also become random. Is there a way to predict all values while keeping the fixed ones unchanged?

entry.title: How to write "IF THEN ELSE" statement with BEX query Key Figure technical ID object in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a calculation in SAP analytics cloud on story level which is 

• IF Net Invoice Value is negative then “Credit memo”

My source is BEx query and I have a key figure in the BEx query i.e "Net Invoice Value" which I want to use in the calculated measure.

The technical id of Net Invoice Value in the BEX query is [00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115]

I tried the following syntax while creating the calculated measure on a story level i.e

IF([00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115] < 0, "Credit Memo", "")

but I am getting an error message below while writing this logic.

"Formula could not be computed: Object is unknown: 00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115. Please complete or rewrite the formula".

I will appreciate if you let me know what is wrong with the formula and how to use BEx object in the SAC calculation which has technical ID associated with it.

Thank You very much in advance.

Regards

entry.title: Self service functionality in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the general practice followed for self service in SAC.

Is it like end users can create stories from scratch or they can copy the standard ones and modify it.

Thanks,

entry.title: Skip Datasphere Log in pop-up screen in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any possibilty that we can skip Datasphere log in Pop-up screen in SAC? due to that pop-up page our reports loading duration takes longer time. We are login with SSO.

Many thanks in advance!

SAP Datasphere SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Single Sign-On
